title: More Rails
description: Adds superpowered rails and directional rails - faster minecarts
body:
## More Rails
**More Rails** adds two new rail types to make minecarts faster and more competitive with elytra

It also tweaks recipes to make rails cheaper

### Superpowered Rails
- Increase minecart top speed to 20m/s
- Superpowered rails are crafted with gold
- Old powered rails are crafted with copper instead of gold

### Directional Rails
- Directional rails are powered rails which only boost minecarts in one direction
- Minecarts approaching directional rails in the wrong direction are reversed
- Minecarts can start from a standstill on directional rails with no block behind them
- Crafted like powered rails with copper, and an additional quartz in the top slot

### Cheaper Recipes
- Crafting regular rails now gives 24, and crafting powered and superpowered rails gives 12

### Minecart Improvements
- The minecart improvements experimental datapack is forcibly enabled
